nasb.text: Then Moses returned to the Lord, and said, “Alas, this people has committed a great sin, and they have made a god of gold for themselves.

esv.text: So Moses returned to the Lord and said, “Alas, this people has sinned a great sin. They have made for themselves gods of gold.

cnv.text: 於是，摩西回到耶和華那裡，說：“唉，這人民犯了大罪，為自己做了金神像。

ccb.text: 摩西回到耶和华那里，说：“唉，百姓犯了大罪，用金子为自己造了神像。
